channel.title: image on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in image on IT notes

item.title: zfs
item.description: FreeBSD zfs disk image Use VirtualBox to install FreeBSD using UFS. After having FreeBSD installed, update your sources and build a custom world and kernel based on your needs for the new image to be created: # cd /usr/src # make -j4 buildworld buildkernel adjust -j4 to the number or cpu cores Use this script to create the image: https://github.com/nbari/freebsd/blob/master/zfs/zfs.sh $ mkdir /raw && cd /raw $ fetch --no-verify-peer https://raw.
